    Index

    A B C D E F G H I J L M N O P Q R S T U 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

    A

    alias - Variable in class iu.dao.TableMetaData
    SQL alias assigned to this table in generated queries (e.g.
    appendCorrelation(StringBuilder, String, String, Iterable) - Static method in class iu.dao.DaoUtils
    Appends correlated subAlias.col = outerAlias.col predicates for each column name, joined by AND.
    appendOrderBy(StringBuilder, Iterable) - Static method in class iu.dao.DaoUtils
    Appends an ORDER BY clause to an existing SQL StringBuilder.
    appendTo(StringBuilder) - Method in class iu.dao.JoinCondition
    Appends the SQL equality condition to the given StringBuilder.
    autobox(Class) - Static method in class iu.dao.DaoUtils
    Returns the boxed wrapper type for a primitive class, or the class itself for non-primitive types.

    B

    buildEffectiveDateCriteria(String, String, String, boolean, Iterable) - Method in class iu.dao.EntityMetaData
    Builds a correlated subquery predicate that constrains a date column to its maximum (past) or minimum (future) effective value as of the given date.
    buildEffectiveDateSeqCriteria(String, String, String, String, Iterable) - Method in class iu.dao.EntityMetaData
    Builds a pair of correlated subquery predicates that together select the row with the maximum effective date as of the given date AND the maximum sequence number for that effective date.
    buildForUpdateCursorQueryFromBean(Class, Iterable) - Method in class iu.dao.IuSqlBuilderImpl
     
    buildMaxDateCriteria(String, String, Iterable) - Method in class iu.dao.EntityMetaData
    Builds a correlated subquery predicate that constrains a date column to the maximum value across all rows with the same ID columns.
    buildWhere(Iterable) - Static method in class iu.dao.DaoUtils
    Builds a WHERE clause from an ordered sequence of SQL predicates.
    buildWhereClause(Iterable) - Method in class iu.dao.IuSqlBuilderImpl
     

    C

    camelToSnakeUpper(String) - Static method in class iu.dao.DaoUtils
    Converts a camelCase identifier to UPPER_SNAKE_CASE.
    column - Variable in class iu.dao.ColumnMetaData
    The Column annotation on the getter, or null for SqlColumn properties.
    ColumnMetaData - Class in iu.dao
    Holds reflection- and annotation-derived metadata for a single mapped bean property of a JPA entity.
    ColumnMetaData(PropertyDescriptor, EntityMetaData) - Constructor for class iu.dao.ColumnMetaData
    Constructs metadata for a single bean property.
    columnName - Variable in class iu.dao.ColumnMetaData
    The physical database column name used in INSERT, UPDATE, and WHERE clauses.
    columnReference(String, String) - Method in class iu.dao.EntityMetaData
    Returns a alias.column SQL reference for a property or column name.
    columns - Variable in class iu.dao.EntityMetaData
    All mapped columns keyed by ColumnMetaData.propertyName in bean-introspection order.
    columnsByNormalizedColumn - Variable in class iu.dao.EntityMetaData
    Column-mapped columns keyed by their normalized column name (ColumnMetaData.columnName uppercased and trimmed).
    columnToPropertyNames - Variable in class iu.dao.EntityMetaData
    Maps each normalized column name to the property name of its ColumnMetaData.

    D

    DaoUtils - Class in iu.dao
    Internal utility methods used across the DAO implementation layer.
    defaultPropertyNames() - Method in class iu.dao.EntityMetaData
    Returns all mapped property names in the order they were discovered during bean introspection (superclass properties first, then subclass properties; within each class in the order returned by Introspector).
    distinct - Variable in class iu.dao.EntityMetaData
    true when the entity class (or a superclass) carries the Distinct annotation, causing SELECT DISTINCT to be emitted.

    E

    effectiveDated - Variable in class iu.dao.EntityMetaData
    The EffectiveDated annotation from the entity hierarchy, or null when absent.
    effectiveDateKeyColumns(String, String[], String[]) - Method in class iu.dao.EntityMetaData
    Returns the column names used to correlate effective-date subqueries for the given date column.
    entityClass - Variable in class iu.dao.EntityMetaData
    The entity class this metadata was built from.
    EntityMetaData - Class in iu.dao
    Holds all reflection- and annotation-derived metadata for a JPA entity class.
    EntityMetaData(Class) - Constructor for class iu.dao.EntityMetaData
    Constructs metadata for the given entity class.

    F

    filtered - Variable in class iu.dao.EntityMetaData
    The Filtered annotation from the entity hierarchy, or null when absent.
    findProperty(Class, String) - Static method in class iu.dao.DaoUtils
    Finds a named bean property on an entity class (or its superclasses).
    fullName - Variable in class iu.dao.TableMetaData
    Schema-qualified table name (schema.name), or the bare TableMetaData.name when no schema is present.

    G

    getAlias(int) - Static method in class iu.dao.DaoUtils
    Generates a short alphabetic SQL table alias for a zero-based index.
    getAllBeanProperties(Class) - Static method in class iu.dao.DaoUtils
    Returns all readable bean properties for an entity class and its full superclass hierarchy (excluding Object).
    getAnnotationFromHierarchy(Class, Class) - Static method in class iu.dao.DaoUtils
    Searches c and each of its superclasses for the given annotation, returning the first match found.
    getAsOfEffectiveDateCriteria(Class, String, String) - Method in class iu.dao.IuSqlBuilderImpl
     
    getAsOfEffectiveDateSeqCriteria(Class, String, String, String) - Method in class iu.dao.IuSqlBuilderImpl
     
    getBeanKeyArgs(Class, Map) - Method in class iu.dao.IuSqlBuilderImpl
     
    getBeanKeyCriteria(Class, Map) - Method in class iu.dao.IuSqlBuilderImpl
     
    getColumnCompareCriteria(Class, String, String, Iterable) - Method in class iu.dao.IuSqlBuilderImpl
     
    getColumnCompareCriteria(String, String, Iterable) - Method in class iu.dao.EntityMetaData
    Returns a SQL comparison predicate for a primary-table column against a list of values.
    getColumnMatchCriteria(Class, String, Iterable) - Method in class iu.dao.IuSqlBuilderImpl
     
    getColumnMatchCriteria(String, Iterable) - Method in class iu.dao.EntityMetaData
    Returns a alias.column IN (v1, v2, ...) SQL predicate for the given column and match values.
    getDeleteArguments(Object) - Method in class iu.dao.IuSqlBuilderImpl
     
    getDeleteStatement() - Method in class iu.dao.EntityMetaData
    Returns the DELETE FROM … WHERE id = ? statement for the primary table.
    getDeleteStatement(Class) - Method in class iu.dao.IuSqlBuilderImpl
     
    getEffectiveDateCriteria(Class, String) - Method in class iu.dao.IuSqlBuilderImpl
     
    getEffectiveDateSeqCriteria(Class, String, String) - Method in class iu.dao.IuSqlBuilderImpl
     
    getFingerprint(Iterable...) - Static method in class iu.dao.DaoUtils
    Computes a stable 64-bit fingerprint over one or more ordered sequences of values.
    getForSql(Object, String) - Method in class iu.dao.IuSqlBuilderImpl
     
    getFutureEffectiveDateCriteria(Class, String, String) - Method in class iu.dao.IuSqlBuilderImpl
     
    getInCriteria(String, Iterable) - Static method in class iu.dao.DaoUtils
    Builds a leftHandSide IN (v1, v2, ...) SQL expression.
    getInCriteria(String, Iterable) - Method in class iu.dao.IuSqlBuilderImpl
     
    getInsertArguments(Object) - Method in class iu.dao.IuSqlBuilderImpl
     
    getInsertStatement() - Method in class iu.dao.EntityMetaData
    Returns the INSERT INTO … (cols) VALUES (?, …) statement for the primary table.
    getInsertStatement(Class) - Method in class iu.dao.IuSqlBuilderImpl
     
    getJoinedAsOfEffectiveDateCriteria(Class, String, String, String, Iterable) - Method in class iu.dao.IuSqlBuilderImpl
     
    getJoinedAsOfEffectiveDateSeqCriteria(Class, String, String, String, String, Iterable) - Method in class iu.dao.IuSqlBuilderImpl
     
    getJoinedColumnCompareCriteria(Class, String, String, String, Iterable) - Method in class iu.dao.IuSqlBuilderImpl
     
    getJoinedColumnCompareCriteria(String, String, String, Iterable) - Method in class iu.dao.EntityMetaData
    Returns a SQL comparison predicate for a column in the given table against a list of values.
    getJoinedColumnMatchCriteria(Class, String, String, Iterable) - Method in class iu.dao.IuSqlBuilderImpl
     
    getJoinedEffectiveDateCriteria(Class, String, String, Iterable) - Method in class iu.dao.IuSqlBuilderImpl
     
    getJoinedFutureEffectiveDateCriteria(Class, String, String, Iterable) - Method in class iu.dao.IuSqlBuilderImpl
     
    getJoinedFutureEffectiveDateCriteria(Class, String, String, String, Iterable) - Method in class iu.dao.IuSqlBuilderImpl
     
    getLiteral(Object) - Method in class iu.dao.IuSqlBuilderImpl
     
    getLiterals(Iterable) - Method in class iu.dao.IuSqlBuilderImpl
     
    getMaxDateCriteria(Class, String) - Method in class iu.dao.IuSqlBuilderImpl
     
    getMultipartKeyListMatch(Iterable, Iterable) - Method in class iu.dao.IuSqlBuilderImpl
     
    getOrderedSelectStatement(Class, Iterable, Iterable) - Method in class iu.dao.IuSqlBuilderImpl
     
    getPrimaryKeyProperties(Class) - Method in class iu.dao.IuSqlBuilderImpl
     
    getPropertyNameFromBean(Class, String) - Method in class iu.dao.IuSqlBuilderImpl
     
    getPropertyValue(Object, PropertyDescriptor) - Static method in class iu.dao.DaoUtils
    Reads the value of a bean property by invoking its getter reflectively.
    getSelectAndFromClause(Class) - Method in class iu.dao.IuSqlBuilderImpl
     
    getSelectAndFromClause(Class, Iterable) - Method in class iu.dao.IuSqlBuilderImpl
     
    getSelectAndFromClause(Iterable) - Method in class iu.dao.EntityMetaData
    Returns a SELECT … FROM … SQL clause with JOIN expressions for each secondary table, optionally restricted to a subset of columns.
    getSelectStatement(Class, Iterable) - Method in class iu.dao.IuSqlBuilderImpl
     
    getSelectStatement(Class, Iterable, int) - Method in class iu.dao.IuSqlBuilderImpl
     
    getSelectStatement(Class, Iterable, Iterable) - Method in class iu.dao.IuSqlBuilderImpl
     
    getSelectStatement(Class, Iterable, Iterable, int) - Method in class iu.dao.IuSqlBuilderImpl
     
    getSelectStatement(Iterable, Iterable, Iterable, boolean) - Method in class iu.dao.EntityMetaData
    Returns a complete SELECT statement including WHERE, ORDER BY, and optionally FOR UPDATE clauses.
    getSqlType(Class, String) - Static method in class iu.dao.DaoUtils
    Determines the JDBC-compatible Java type to use for a named property when binding SQL parameters or reading result sets.
    getTableAlias(Class, String) - Method in class iu.dao.IuSqlBuilderImpl
     
    getUpdateArguments(Object, Iterable) - Method in class iu.dao.IuSqlBuilderImpl
     
    getUpdateProperties(Object) - Method in class iu.dao.IuSqlBuilderImpl
     
    getUpdateProperties(Object, Object) - Method in class iu.dao.IuSqlBuilderImpl
     
    getUpdateProperties(Object, Supplier) - Method in class iu.dao.IuSqlBuilderImpl
     
    getUpdateStatement(Class, Iterable) - Method in class iu.dao.IuSqlBuilderImpl
     
    getUpdateStatement(Iterable) - Method in class iu.dao.EntityMetaData
    Returns an UPDATE … SET … WHERE statement for the given primary-table properties.
    getWhereClause(Iterable) - Method in class iu.dao.IuSqlBuilderImpl
     

    H

    hasValue(String) - Static method in class iu.dao.DaoUtils
    Returns true if the given string is non-null and contains at least one non-whitespace character.

    I

    id - Variable in class iu.dao.ColumnMetaData
    The Id annotation on the getter, or null when the property is not part of the entity's primary key.
    idColumns - Variable in class iu.dao.EntityMetaData
    Columns whose getter carries Id, in bean-introspection order.
    idCriteria(Iterable, String) - Static method in class iu.dao.DaoUtils
    Builds a lazy iterable of columnName = placeholder predicates for each ID column (no alias prefix), for use in an UPDATE … WHERE clause.
    idCriteria(String, Iterable, String) - Static method in class iu.dao.DaoUtils
    Builds a lazy iterable of alias.columnName = placeholder predicates for each ID column, for use in a WHERE clause with a table alias.
    initializeJoinConditions(EntityMetaData) - Method in class iu.dao.TableMetaData
    Initializes the join conditions for this secondary table.
    isMappedColumn() - Method in class iu.dao.ColumnMetaData
    Returns true when the property is mapped via Column (i.e. has a physical column name and table binding).
    isPrimaryColumn() - Method in class iu.dao.ColumnMetaData
    Returns true when the property is mapped via Column and belongs to the entity's primary table.
    isTransient(PropertyDescriptor) - Static method in class iu.dao.DaoUtils
    Determines if Transient is present on a property's read method.
    iu.dao - package iu.dao
     
    iu.util.dao.impl - module iu.util.dao.impl
    Data Access Object toolkit implementation module.
    IuSqlBuilderImpl - Class in iu.dao
    Default IuSqlBuilder implementation.
    IuSqlBuilderImpl() - Constructor for class iu.dao.IuSqlBuilderImpl
    Default constructor.

    J

    JoinCondition - Class in iu.dao
    Represents a single SQL equality condition used to join a secondary table to the primary table in a JPA entity mapping.
    JoinCondition(String, ColumnMetaData) - Constructor for class iu.dao.JoinCondition
    Creates a join condition where the primary and secondary tables share the same column name.
    JoinCondition(String, PrimaryKeyJoinColumn, EntityMetaData) - Constructor for class iu.dao.JoinCondition
    Creates a join condition from an explicit PrimaryKeyJoinColumn annotation.
    joinConditions - Variable in class iu.dao.TableMetaData
    Ordered sequence of SQL equality conditions used to join this secondary table to the primary table.
    joinKeyword(SqlJoinType.Type) - Static method in class iu.dao.DaoUtils
    Returns the SQL JOIN keyword for the given join type.
    joinType - Variable in class iu.dao.EntityMetaData
    The join type used when joining secondary tables.

    L

    literalFromDate(Date) - Static method in class iu.dao.DaoUtils
    Formats a Date value as a SQL TIMESTAMP literal.

    M

    mapColumnsToSqlTypes(Object) - Method in class iu.dao.IuSqlBuilderImpl
     
    mapIdColumnsToSqlTypes(Object) - Method in class iu.dao.IuSqlBuilderImpl
     

    N

    name - Variable in class iu.dao.TableMetaData
    Unqualified table name as it appears in the database.
    normalizeArgument(Object) - Method in class iu.dao.ColumnMetaData
    Normalizes a bind-parameter value before it is passed to a JDBC statement.
    normalizeName(String) - Static method in class iu.dao.DaoUtils
    Normalizes a database object name to a trimmed, uppercase string.

    O

    of(Class) - Static method in class iu.dao.EntityMetaData
    Returns the cached EntityMetaData for the given entity class, constructing it on the first call.

    P

    primary - Variable in class iu.dao.TableMetaData
    true for the entity's primary table; false for secondary tables.
    primaryColumns - Variable in class iu.dao.EntityMetaData
    All Column-mapped columns belonging to the primary table, in bean-introspection order.
    primaryNonIdColumns - Variable in class iu.dao.EntityMetaData
    Primary-table columns that are not annotated with Id.
    primaryTable - Variable in class iu.dao.EntityMetaData
    Metadata for the primary table; always assigned the alias "a".
    property - Variable in class iu.dao.ColumnMetaData
    The PropertyDescriptor from bean introspection that this metadata describes.
    propertyName - Variable in class iu.dao.ColumnMetaData
    The bean property name derived from the getter, e.g.

    Q

    qualifyName(String, String) - Static method in class iu.dao.DaoUtils
    Returns a schema-qualified name when a schema is present, otherwise returns the bare name.

    R

    reference() - Method in class iu.dao.ColumnMetaData
    Returns the SQL reference for this column using the table's own alias.
    reference(String) - Method in class iu.dao.ColumnMetaData
    Returns the SQL reference for this column, optionally overriding the table alias.
    requirePrimaryColumn(String) - Method in class iu.dao.EntityMetaData
    Looks up a primary-table column by property or column name, throwing if it is not found or does not belong to the primary table.
    resolveAlias(String) - Method in class iu.dao.EntityMetaData
    Resolves a table name or alias to the canonical alias used in SQL.
    resolveColumn(String) - Method in class iu.dao.EntityMetaData
    Looks up a column by property name or by normalized column name.
    resolveEffectiveDatedCriteria() - Method in class iu.dao.EntityMetaData
    Resolves effective-date subquery predicates from the EffectiveDated annotation.
    resolveFilter(SqlFilter) - Method in class iu.dao.EntityMetaData
    Converts a single SqlFilter annotation into a SQL predicate string.
    resolveFilters() - Method in class iu.dao.EntityMetaData
    Resolves the Filtered annotation's filter entries into SQL predicate strings.
    resolveTable(String) - Method in class iu.dao.EntityMetaData
    Resolves a table reference to its TableMetaData.

    S

    secondaryTable - Variable in class iu.dao.TableMetaData
    The SecondaryTable annotation that declared this table, or null for the primary table.
    secondaryTables - Variable in class iu.dao.EntityMetaData
    Ordered list of secondary-table metadata; empty when no SecondaryTable or SecondaryTables annotation is present.
    selectAlias - Variable in class iu.dao.ColumnMetaData
    The AS alias emitted in a SELECT list for SqlColumn-mapped properties.
    selectAndFromCache - Variable in class iu.dao.EntityMetaData
    Cache for SELECT … FROM clause fragments, keyed by fingerprint.
    selectStatementCache - Variable in class iu.dao.EntityMetaData
    Cache for complete SELECT statement strings, keyed by fingerprint.
    singleQuoted(String) - Static method in class iu.dao.DaoUtils
    Wraps a string value in SQL single quotes, escaping any embedded single quotes by doubling them.
    spaceForNull - Variable in class iu.dao.ColumnMetaData
    true when null bound values for this property should be replaced with a single space character.
    spaceForNull - Variable in class iu.dao.EntityMetaData
    true when the entity class (or a superclass) carries the SpaceForNull annotation at the class level, causing null bound values to be replaced with a single space for all columns unless overridden at the property level.
    sql - Variable in class iu.dao.ColumnMetaData
    The SQL fragment used to reference this property in a SELECT list.
    sqlColumn - Variable in class iu.dao.ColumnMetaData
    The SqlColumn annotation on the getter, or null for Column-mapped properties.

    T

    table - Variable in class iu.dao.ColumnMetaData
    The TableMetaData that owns this column's physical table, resolved from Column.table().
    TableMetaData - Class in iu.dao
    Holds table-level metadata for a primary or secondary table in a JPA entity mapping.
    TableMetaData(String, String, String, boolean, SecondaryTable) - Constructor for class iu.dao.TableMetaData
    Constructs table metadata.
    tablesByReference - Variable in class iu.dao.EntityMetaData
    Lookup map for all tables (primary and secondary) keyed by each of the table's short name, fully-qualified name, and alias — all normalized via DaoUtils.normalizeName(String).

    U

    updateStatementCache - Variable in class iu.dao.EntityMetaData
    Cache for UPDATE statement strings, keyed by fingerprint.
